name: The Gate

setup.description: Push two tees into the green just wider than your putter head, right next to the ball, forming a putter gate. Push two more tees into the green just wider than the ball, about 6 inches in front of it, forming a ball gate. Putt 10 balls from 6 feet, clearing both gates cleanly. Play 3 rounds and record your best score of the 3.

rules.description: Play 10 putts from 6 feet, each one required to pass cleanly through both gates on its way to the hole.
scoring: 1 point per made putt that passes through both gates without touching the tees
Play 3 rounds; record your best score of the 3

caption: Two gates now — clip either one and it doesn't count, even if it goes in. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
